_source.note: Coordinates from USGS NWIS site service (dec_lat_va / dec_long_va). Verify on USGS monitoring pages.

properties.name: NF Big Lost River at Wild Horse NR Chilly ID
Big Lost River BL Mackay Res NR Mackay ID
properties.notes: Primary gage below Mackay Reservoir. Major context for basin yield and the Mackay→downstream shrink chart.
properties.historical_summary: Long record; key reference for upper/mid basin flow entering the lower valley.

properties.name: Big Lost River at Leslie ID
properties.notes: Mid-basin gage at Leslie (WD34 accounting reach). NWIS publishes only a single early annual-stat year — use Mackay→Moore→Arco step-down for the long record.
properties.historical_summary: WD34 admin reach boundary; flow here is what remains after upper-valley diversions.

properties.name: Big Lost River NR Moore ID
properties.notes: At Moore — the practical lower limit of reliable surface flow in most recent years per WD34 accounting and IDWR/USGS reports.
properties.historical_summary: The 'now' story anchor: surface flow commonly terminates near Moore in dry years, long before Arco or the sinks.

properties.name: Big Lost River Below Moore Div NR Moore ID
properties.notes: Immediately below the Moore diversion — the split point used for the 'then vs now' channel styling on the map.
properties.historical_summary: WD34 Moore Diversion accounting point. The channel below this gage (toward Arco and the sinks) is the reach that has largely gone dry.

properties.name: Big Lost River NR Arco ID
properties.notes: CRITICAL extent indicator. Record since 1946. Published averages: ~54k AF/yr (1944–68) vs ~17k AF/yr (2000–19). Zero or near-zero annual mean in many recent years (2021, 2022, 2025 = 0.0 cfs).
properties.historical_summary: Flow rarely reaches Arco anymore — when it does register here, it is a fraction of historical volumes. Many years the annual mean is literally zero.

properties.name: Big Lost R at Lincoln Blvd Bridge NR Atomic City ID
properties.notes: Lower basin gage on the sinks limb (1984+). Record ends 2018 — gage discontinued.
properties.historical_summary: When positive flow was recorded here, surface water had continued past Arco toward the sinks area.

properties.name: Big Lost River AB Big Lost River Sinks NR Howe ID
properties.notes: Above the terminal sinks near Howe — downstream-most in the network. Record ends 2018 — gage discontinued. On the eastern sinks limb, not near Arco.
properties.historical_summary: When positive flow was recorded here, surface water had reached the Big Lost River Sinks area — the river's historic terminus.

properties.name: Big Lost River BL Playa No.1 NR Howe ID
properties.notes: At the sinks playa near Howe. NWIS has no discharge statistics for this site in the public API — context gage only; see 13132565 (above sinks) for the flow record on this reach.
properties.historical_summary: Terminal playa gage; positive flow here means water reached the sinks complex.
